name: Ongoing Intake Assessment Pipeline
description: Reusable ongoing workflow with assessment-driven rework for each intake work item.
outcome: The workflow returns to pending when idle while each intake item follows the same subject-centric assessment path.

definition.process_instructions: This is an ongoing workflow. Each root work item is an independent intake request. Route the intake analyst first, assess the resulting subject with the policy assessor, and reopen the same subject when changes are requested. Do not complete the workflow when one item finishes; leave it pending for future work items.

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: What this live workflow should accomplish

columns.label: Planned
columns.description: Work is defined but not yet assigned.

columns.label: Blocked
columns.description: Work is blocked and needs intervention.

columns.label: Done
columns.description: The work item meets its acceptance criteria.

stages.name: intake-triage
stages.goal: Each intake item is triaged and assessed.

checkpoints.name: intake-triage
checkpoints.goal: Each intake item is triaged and assessed.
checkpoints.entry_criteria: A root intake work item exists.
